name: Caramel Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sweet potatoes, mashed, cooked (about 4 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, whip together the egg white and evaporated skim milk.
2. Add the mashed sweet potatoes; stir until smooth.
3. Stir in the chopped dates.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Pour maple syrup over the top of the mixture in the casserole.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until hot.
